name: Sharon
meaning: A fertile plain, rose of Sharon

name: Mansi
meaning: A woman with a sound mind

name: Ishita
meaning: One who has mastered the world

name: Reyansh
meaning: A ray of light, part of sun

name: Soham
meaning: I am He, identity with God

name: Nathaniel

name: Yogita

name: Onkar

name: Yazhini
